---
title: "Shunyu Wu (吴舜禹)"
subtitle: "Optimization, Forecasting, and Quantitative Decision Methods"
description: "Ph.D. candidate at Shanghai Jiao Tong University working on optimization, forecasting, and quantitative modeling for large-scale operational settings."
keywords:
  - Shunyu Wu
  - shunyuwu
  - 吴舜禹
  - Optimization
  - Forecasting
  - Quantitative Modeling
toc: false
page-layout: full
---

<script type="application/ld+json">
{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@graph": [
    {
      "@type": "Person",
      "@id": "https://shunyuwu-shaun.github.io/#person",
      "name": "Shunyu Wu",
      "alternateName": ["shunyuwu", "Shaun Wu", "吴舜禹"],
      "givenName": "Shunyu",
      "familyName": "Wu",
      "url": "https://shunyuwu-shaun.github.io/",
      "affiliation": {
        "@type": "CollegeOrUniversity",
        "name": "Shanghai Jiao Tong University"
      },
      "jobTitle": "Ph.D. Candidate",
      "email": "mailto:shunyuwu@sjtu.edu.cn",
      "sameAs": [
        "https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=keb-zTsAAAAJ&hl=zh-CN&oi=ao",
        "https://orcid.org/0000-0001-9856-2148",
        "https://github.com/ShunyuWu-Shaun",
        "https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Shunyu-Wu?ev=hdr_xprf"
      ],
      "knowsAbout": [
        "Optimization",
        "Forecasting",
        "Quantitative modeling",
        "Operations research",
        "Data analysis",
        "Applied mathematics"
      ]
    },
    {
      "@type": "WebSite",
      "@id": "https://shunyuwu-shaun.github.io/#website",
      "url": "https://shunyuwu-shaun.github.io/",
      "name": "Shunyu Wu Academic Website",
      "inLanguage": "en",
      "publisher": {
        "@id": "https://shunyuwu-shaun.github.io/#person"
      }
    },
    {
      "@type": "ProfilePage",
      "@id": "https://shunyuwu-shaun.github.io/#profile",
      "url": "https://shunyuwu-shaun.github.io/",
      "name": "Shunyu Wu Profile",
      "mainEntity": {
        "@id": "https://shunyuwu-shaun.github.io/#person"
      }
    }
  ]
}
</script>

::: {.hero-layout}
::: {.hero-card .hero-main}
## About

I am a Ph.D. candidate in **Control Science and Engineering** at **Shanghai Jiao Tong University**. My research spans **optimization**, **forecasting**, **quantitative modeling**, and **data-informed decision methods** for large-scale real-world applications.

::: {.hero-lead}
I work across forecasting, system modeling, optimization, and deployment: from quantitative analysis methods to fielded operational workflows in large-scale settings.
:::

::: {.hero-buttons}
[Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=keb-zTsAAAAJ&hl=zh-CN&oi=ao)
[ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0001-9856-2148)
[GitHub](https://github.com/ShunyuWu-Shaun)
[Download CV](/cv/)
:::

::: {.interest-chips}
<span class="interest-chip">Optimization</span>
<span class="interest-chip">Forecasting</span>
<span class="interest-chip">Quantitative Modeling</span>
<span class="interest-chip">Decision Methods</span>
<span class="interest-chip">Operational Systems</span>
<span class="interest-chip">Deployment Reliability</span>
:::
:::

::: {.profile-card}
![](/assets/images/shunyu-wu-avatar.jpg){.profile-photo alt="Shunyu Wu profile photo"}

<div>
<div class="profile-name">Shunyu Wu</div>
<div class="profile-role">Ph.D. Candidate, Shanghai Jiao Tong University</div>
<div class="profile-role">Optimization, forecasting, and deployable quantitative methods</div>
</div>
:::
:::

::: {.snapshot-grid}
::: {.snapshot-item}
<div class="snapshot-number">3+</div>
<div class="snapshot-label">First-author publications</div>
:::
::: {.snapshot-item}
<div class="snapshot-number">2</div>
<div class="snapshot-label">Deployment domains (Power, Water)</div>
:::
::: {.snapshot-item}
<div class="snapshot-number">14</div>
<div class="snapshot-label">Students co-mentored (1 Ph.D. + 13 M.Sc.)</div>
:::
::: {.snapshot-item}
<div class="snapshot-number">2026</div>
<div class="snapshot-label">Expected Ph.D. graduation</div>
:::
:::

<hr class="page-section-divider" />

## Research Highlights

::: {.card-list}
::: {.entry-card}
#### Optimization and Decision Methods
I study how predictive models and optimization procedures can be combined for better downstream decisions in practical settings.
:::
::: {.entry-card}
#### Forecasting and Quantitative Modeling
I combine forecasting, system modeling, domain-informed structure, and operator knowledge to build analytical methods that fit real operational settings.
:::
::: {.entry-card}
#### Reliable Implementation
I design quantitative workflows with validation checks, reliability safeguards, and operator-facing interfaces for long-running real-world applications.
:::
:::

## Selected Publications

::: {.card-list}
::: {.entry-card}
#### Journal article on resource scheduling and operational efficiency (IEEE TSG, 2025)
DOI: [10.1109/TSG.2025.3601238](https://doi.org/10.1109/TSG.2025.3601238)
:::
::: {.entry-card}
#### Journal article on urban demand forecasting (ESWA, 2024)
DOI: [10.1016/j.eswa.2024.124508](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.eswa.2024.124508)
:::
::: {.entry-card}
#### Journal article on pressure modeling and uncertainty handling (IEEE TCSS, 2023)
DOI: [10.1109/TCSS.2023.3272330](https://doi.org/10.1109/TCSS.2023.3272330)
:::
:::

For complete records, see [Publications](/publications/).

## Selected Deployments

::: {.card-list}
::: {.entry-card}
#### Energy-System Efficiency Optimization
Applied optimization workflow with stable long-run operation and measurable efficiency gains across multiple operating scenarios.

Details: [Projects](/projects/)
:::
::: {.entry-card}
#### Urban Operations Scheduling and Decision Support
Forecast-optimize workflow for scheduling and service-level coordination in a real-world demonstration setting.

Details: [Projects](/projects/)
:::
:::

## Common Academic Sections

::: {.two-col-grid}
::: {.feature-card}
#### Academic Service
- Conference reviewing: ICLR, AAAI, CDC, IFAC-related venues.
- Journal reviewing: IEEE TSMC Systems, IEEE TASE, IEEE TIV.
- Mentoring: 1 Ph.D. and 13 M.Sc. students co-mentored.

More: [Service](/service/)
:::
::: {.feature-card}
#### News and Collaboration
- Publication status updates and deployment milestones.
- Ongoing collaborations in optimization, modeling, and quantitative analysis.
- Research contact and profile links for quick reach-out.

Browse: [News](/news/) and [Contact](/contact/)
:::
:::

## Visitor Insights

::: {.section-note}
The module below shows total page views, unique visitors, current visitor region, and a 3D globe view.
:::

::: {.visitor-grid}
<div class="visitor-stat"><span class="label">Page Views</span><span class="value" id="visitor-pv">--</span></div>
<div class="visitor-stat"><span class="label">Unique Visitors</span><span class="value" id="visitor-uv">--</span></div>
<div class="visitor-stat"><span class="label">Current Visitor Region</span><span class="value" id="visitor-geo">Detecting...</span></div>
:::

<div class="visitor-counter">
<div class="visitor-globe" id="visitor-globe-home"></div>
<p class="globe-note">3D globe shows the current visitor position and the research home base (Shanghai).</p>
</div>

## Latest News

- **2026-02**: Visual refresh with a softer interface style and 3D visitor globe.
- **2026-02**: Site migrated from legacy URL `shuanyuwu.github.io` to `shunyuwu-shaun.github.io`.
- **2025-11**: IEEE Transactions on Smart Grid paper indexed with DOI.
- **2025-08**: New manuscripts on optimization and quantitative decision methods entered active submission and review cycles.
- **2025-05**: An applied optimization workflow entered long-run production operation.
